allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('avg_rating:', d.get\('avg_rating'\)\); print\('review_count:', d.get\('review_count'\)\); print\('units_sold:', d.get\('units_sold'\)\); print\('reviews:', len\(d.get\('reviews',[]\)\)\); print\('faqs:', len\(d.get\('faqs',[]\)\)\); print\('specs:', d.get\('specifications'\)\); print\('variants:', d.get\('variants'\)\); print\('wholesale:', d.get\('wholesale_pricing'\)\); print\('kyb:', d.get\('kyb_verified'\)\); print\('years:', d.get\('years_on_platform'\)\); print\('supplier_total_orders:', d.get\('supplier_total_orders'\)\)")
